phases.name: Wire upgrade prompt to staircase transition

steps.name: Trigger upgradePrompt screen mode on every non-final floor descent
steps.criteria: Given Ember steps onto the staircase on floors 1–4, when applyMove processes the transition, then the returned state has screenMode .upgradePrompt(choices:) with exactly 3 distinct upgrade entries not already in the player's active upgrades, and currentFloor and playerPosition are already advanced to the next floor. Given Ember descends from floor 4 to floor 5, the upgrade prompt still fires. Given any descent from the final floor, no upgrade prompt fires and the state returns directly to dungeon mode. Note: add upgradeChoiceCount = 3 to GameConfig as part of this step.
steps.scenario_name: The upgrade prompt shows exactly 3 options at a milestone floor transition
